categories.name: Speed Converters
categories.description: Convert between network speed units — bits and bytes, per second.

tools.name: Mbps to Bytes Converter
tools.description: Convert megabits per second to Bytes/s, KB/s and MB/s — see the real download speed behind your internet plan.

tools.name: Bytes to Mbps Converter
tools.description: Convert Bytes/s, KB/s or MB/s into megabits per second, with decimal (SI) and binary (IEC) support.

tools.name: Mbps to MB/s Converter
tools.description: See your plan's real download speed — 100 Mbps = 12.5 MB/s. With MiB/s support and plan comparison.

tools.name: Gbps to Mbps Converter
tools.description: 1 Gbps = 1,000 Mbps, exactly — multi-gig plans converted, with real-world ~940 Mbps context.

tools.name: Kbps to Mbps Converter
tools.description: 1,000 Kbps = 1 Mbps — with the audio-bitrate ladder: what 128, 320 and 1,411 Kbps really mean.

categories.name: Network Tools
categories.description: Calculators for network engineering, capacity planning, and performance analysis.

tools.name: Download Time Calculator
tools.description: How long will any file take? Enter size and speed — 100 GB at 100 Mbps ≈ 2h 13m, with real-world overhead.

tools.name: Packets Per Second (PPS) Calculator
tools.description: Convert bandwidth to packets per second with correct line-rate math — 1 Gbps at 64B = 1.49M PPS, wire overhead included.
